ofm.title: OnlyFans 2026 crackdown is live
ofm.summary: biometric verification, AI detection tools, 30-40% revenue drops for violators. DMs still drive 60-70% of income — AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection. Source: https://b9-agency.com/blog/how-to-create-ai-onlyfans-model-2026

ofm.title: OnlyMonster is winning
ofm.summary: Became the go-to OFM management system with integrated AI assistance, outpacing competitors purely through product during Beta with no marketing. Source: https://onlymonster.ai/

ofm.title: Fanvue is the AI-friendly platform
ofm.summary: Explicitly welcoming AI-generated models with Voice AI replies, AI Analytics, and dedicated AI Creator resources. Market positioning as the leader for virtual models. Source: https://www.fanvue.com/pages/fanvue-ai

ofm.title: AI influencer market at $6-8B
ofm.summary: Forecasted to grow through 2026. Reddit reports show early creators making $300+ in first month with consistency. Source: https://www.imagine.art/blogs/how-ai-influencers-make-money

ofm.title: New compliance tool Sozee
ofm.summary: Offers private AI models built specifically for adult workflows with OnlyFans 7-rule compliance built in. Source: https://sozee.ai/resources/onlyfans-ai-rules-2026/

tools.title: Claude Code Auto Mode released (March 27)
tools.summary: Intelligent classifier-based action approval for truly zero-friction automation. First-party "secure automation without friction" workflow. Source: https://claudelab.net/en/articles/claude-code/claude-code-auto-mode-guide

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.22 major drop
tools.summary: 45 new features, ContextEngine plugin interface, 200+ bug fixes, ClawHub API compatibility checks. Moving from "cool demo" to production-ready. Source: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases

tools.title: 40% of workflows agentic by 2026
tools.summary: Enterprise projection that ~40% of business workflows will be managed by agentic AI (plan, execute, course-correct) not humans clicking buttons. Source: https://logicballs.com/news/autonomous-agentic-ai-enterprise-workflow-trends-2026

tools.title: "Vibe coding" goes mainstream
tools.summary: ~40% of enterprise software expected to be built using natural-language-driven prompts guiding AI to generate working logic. Source: https://www.salesmate.io/blog/future-of-ai-agents/

tools.title: Standardized tool connectivity is the shift
tools.summary: The biggest change in agentic workflows — less custom glue code, more standardized connectors. Safety and governance become core system features. Source: https://www.stackai.com/blog/the-2026-guide-to-agentic-workflow-architectures

market.title: Puerto Escondido accelerating
market.summary: La Punta transforming with new boutique developments, infinity pools, ocean views attracting international turnkey buyers. Market structurally more resilient than 5 years ago. Source: https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-real-estate-market-trends-2026-investment-opportunities-on-oaxacas-pacific-coast/

market.title: Airport driving property values
market.summary: United Airlines launched direct Houston route April 2025; additional Canadian and US gateway routes planned for 2026. Infrastructure development reshaping entire market. Source: https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/transportation-infrastructure-how-puerto-escondidos-airport-transformation-is-reshaping-property-values/

market.title: Los Tamarindos infrastructure upgrades
market.summary: Santa María Colotepec municipality announced 2025-2026 water system upgrades, road paving, enhanced drainage in Brisas de Zicatela neighborhoods. Source: https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/los-tamarindos-puerto-escondido-up-and-coming-neighborhood-guide/

market.title: Rammed earth evolving
market.summary: Baja Blox offering prefab earth blocks in Baja; digital fabrication workflows (Rhino/Grasshopper → CNC ramming) emerging. Earth USA conference Sept 18-20 2026 in Santa Fe. Source: https://bajablox.com/ + https://www.earthusa.org

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competition
market.summary: Competitor (tulumatvrental.com) claims "no real competition" — pricing at $85/day (24hr), $300/week, $600/month. Self-guided tour operators entering market. Lagoon Company positioning still dominant but watch pricing pressure.

actions.text: OFM: Consider Fanvue as primary AI model platform (more permissive than OF). Test OnlyMonster for existing human creator management. Do NOT rely on AI chatbots for DMs — human emotional connection is still the revenue driver.

AI/Automation: Enable Claude Code Auto Mode for faster dev workflows. Review OpenClaw's new ContextEngine plugins — may replace custom glue code. The 40% agentic shift means Beno's early investment in agent workflows is directionally correct.

Oaxaca: Los Tamarindos infrastructure timing (2025-2026) aligns with Hilltop Villa build schedule — good for access roads/utilities. Monitor new flight routes for tourism rental potential. Consider Baja Blox connection for rammed earth block supply chain.

Lagoon: Competitor pricing ($85/day) is benchmark — ensure Lagoon rates maintain premium positioning. Tulum market getting more crowded; double down on experience differentiation (yacht/UTV combos, Lagoon's local knowledge advantage).
